Images Related to CERN

Jul 10, 2018

You may not see some of pictures. Because you did not logged in into your CERN account.

Sr. No. Name and Link Image
1 CERN accelerator complex
2 Map of LHC
3 Overall view of LHC
4 Overall view of LHC
5 LHC octants
6 Systematic layout of one LHC cell
7 Standard dipole cross-section; Diagram showing the cross-section of an LHC dipole magnet with cold mass and vacuum chamber.
8 computer generated LHC dipole diagram
9 Geological section along the axes ofthe beam dumps
10 Beam dump, nord-west branch.
11 Diagram of the beam dumps at LHC Point 6
12 Beam dump configuration at Point 6.
13 Other experiments at LHC accelrating chain
14 Magnetic multipoles
15 CMS Detector Slice
16 CMS Experiment
17 CMS Detector Drawings
17 CMS Detector Drawings
17 CMS Detector Drawings
17 CMS Detector Drawings
17 CMS Detector Drawings
18 CMS Detector Drawings
19 CMS Solenoid
20 CMS Muon Station
21 Three generations of matter
22 Position of the various BRIL systems inside CMS
23 Higgs potential
24 Particle Physics Periodic Table
25 The installation of the CMS beam pipe

My Learning Notes

In this website, I summarize things that I learn and might be useful for others. This site will contain materials that mostly an experimental particle physicist needs.
